name: forge_and_wire_mcp
description: General purpose: detect or specify missing service, run Connector Forge (python3 connector_forge.py --forge-and-register-podman --service X --non-interactive), auto-build podman image for the helper MCP, register in ~/.grok/config.toml via podman stdio (add_podman_mcp logic), emit dedicated TASK json like *_use.task.json, update connector_index.json. Supports podman MCPs for godaddy/taskmaster/no-proof style. Compact {name; param} or /task invocation. Real files + execution verified.

service.description: Service name to forge e.g. 'no_proof_deployer_helper' or 'custom_api'

resource_type.description: web_api | filesystem | database | app | other (defaults web_api per forge)

auth_method.description: api_key | oauth2 | basic_auth | service_account | none | other

steps.description: cd /home/nicsins/workdir/connector_forge; python3 connector_forge.py --forge-and-register-podman --service {{service}} --non-interactive (with other params). Produces generated_connectors/<service>/ + mcp server py + Dockerfile stub, builds image, updates index.

Ensure ~/.grok/config.toml updated under [mcp_servers.<sanitized_service>] with podman run -i --rm ... image (use buildPodmanStdioConfig logic or direct write like current no_proof section). Matches add_podman_mcp TASK.
Write ~/.grok/tasks/<service>_use.task.json (compact style + full steps for search/use). Update any explorer.
podman images confirm new image; grep config for section; search_tool for new tools if MCP reloaded; run /home/nicsins/workdir/bin/task with new TASK if available.
Optional push generated/ + new TASK to github:nicsins/grok-super-taskmaster via push_files; linear/github comment.

example_invocation: {forge_and_wire_mcp; service=my_new_api; description=Access to MyAPI; base_url=https://api.my.com; non_interactive=true}
ties_to: connector_forge.py (verified run), add_podman_mcp.json, no_proof_deployer_helper_use.task.json (emitted example), wire_connector_forge.json, forge_new_connector.json, forge_and_register_missing_connector.json, podman images/builds, ~/.grok/config.toml
symbiotic: Core for issues #3 (forge). Enables dynamic extension of podman MCP swarm (no-proof, godaddy, vercel, taskmaster). Pairs with full_no_proof_deploy, execute_symbiotic_task, register_podman_mcp. Supports /task minimal + explorer in mcp-server.
